targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('$__interval', time) AS time, avg(close) AS "VOO"
FROM prices
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND symbol = 'VOO'
  AND (granularity = 'daily' OR time >= CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
